expectations.text: Response starts with measurement before proposing changes
expectations.evidence: Phase 1: Measurement table comes first, Phase 2: Optimization follows

expectations.text: Response identifies Korean text as an optimization target
Response shows before/after or diff preview of proposed changes
expectations.evidence: Full current vs proposed value shown for both refactor-cleaner and CLAUDE.md

expectations.text: Response includes estimated token savings per change
expectations.evidence: 76 tokens for agent, 663 tokens for CLAUDE.md, total 739

expectations.text: Response asks for user approval before applying
expectations.evidence: Dry-run evaluation note + Action Items section asking user to approve

expectations.text: Response covers global items not just project
expectations.evidence: Covers agents (refactor-cleaner), skills, global CLAUDE.md, project CLAUDE.md, memory
